summary: Completed comprehensive testing of IntelliEngine IPO-readiness platform. All core features working correctly including authentication, project management, DRHP builder with 13 sections, and document upload with OCR processing.
passed_tests: Authentication with session tokens (401 for unauthenticated requests)
OCR processing with Emergent LLM integration
Login page loads with Google OAuth and email/password forms
DRHP Builder page with all sections
Section Editor with content editing and document upload
Navigation between all pages working correctly
